# Link

Lift's default links are just regular `<a>` tags.

<Canvas of={LinkStories.Primary} />

## Minimal

"Minimal" links look like normal text until they are in a hover or focus state.

<Canvas of={LinkStories.Minimal} />

## Inverse

"Inverse" links are for dark backgrounds.

<Canvas of={LinkStories.Inverse} />
